CustomField.description: Source Tix:INC0366666 This field tracks reason for sales price change on opportunity product
CustomField.label: Change Reason

value.fullName: Customer changed quantity in PO vs. Quote
value.label: Customer changed quantity in PO vs. Quote

value.fullName: Customer changed item(s) in PO vs. Quote
value.label: Customer changed item(s) in PO vs. Quote

value.fullName: Customer added in PO optional items from Quote
value.label: Customer added in PO optional items from Quote

value.fullName: Freight value in PO is different from Quote
value.label: Freight value in PO is different from Quote
